title: Embedded Systems Engineer / Iegulto sistēmu inženieris/-e (C/C++/Linux)

summary.lv: Iegulto sistēmu inženieris (WorkingDay Latvia klients — Izraēlas R&D uzņēmums TandemG) — iegultās programmatūras izpēte, projektēšana un izstrāde C/C++ valodā Linux user space vidē ar Yocto; nepieciešama 4+ gadu C/C++ un Linux pieredze.
summary.en: Embedded systems engineer (a WorkingDay Latvia client, Israeli R&D company TandemG) researching, designing and developing embedded software in C/C++ on Linux user space with Yocto; 4+ years of C/C++ and Linux experience required.
